settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your project data and preferences.

appLanguage.heading: App Language
appLanguage.description: Choose the language for Zagafy's interface — menus, buttons, and labels. This is separate from your project's writing language below and never affects your manuscript or AI output.

projectLanguage.heading: Project Language
projectLanguage.description: Set the language for your project. All AI analysis, ingestion, and assistant responses will use this language. Content will never be translated.

writerMemory.heading: Writer Memory
writerMemory.description: The AI coach builds up observations about your craft (pacing, dialogue, description, plot, voice) as you run it. The top three are folded back into future micro-prompts and coaching sessions. Browse them under <link>Writing Map</link>.
writerMemory.remembered: Currently remembered: {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}}.
writerMemory.confirmMessage: Clear all {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}} the AI coach has built up about your craft? Future suggestions will start fresh. This cannot be undone.

spellcheck.heading: Spellcheck
spellcheck.description: Use the browser's built-in spellchecker on writing surfaces. Turn this off when you're polishing dialect, made-up names, or invented vocabulary and the red squiggles get in the way.
spellcheck.roadmap: A richer grammar layer (LanguageTool) is on the roadmap — see docs/ROADMAP.md.

exportProject.heading: Export Project
exportProject.description: Download your entire Story Bible, manuscript, characters, and timeline as a JSON file. You can use this for backup or to process with other tools.

restoreProject.heading: Restore Project
restoreProject.description: Import a previously exported JSON file to restore your Story Bible. This will replace all current data.
restoreProject.confirmMessage: This will replace ALL current project data with the imported file. A backup of your current data will be saved automatically.
restoreProject.parseError: Failed to parse JSON file. Make sure it is a valid Story Bible export.
restoreProject.tooLarge: Import file is too large (max {mb} MB).

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-friendly analytics help us understand how Zagafy is used. No manuscript content is ever collected. Session recordings mask all text.
analytics.dntNote: Your browser has Do-Not-Track enabled. Analytics are automatically disabled.
analytics.enabled: Analytics enabled. Reload for changes to take full effect.
analytics.disabled: Analytics disabled. Reload for changes to take full effect.

onboarding.heading: Onboarding Tour
onboarding.description: Replay the guided tour that introduces the main areas of Zagafy. Useful if you skipped it during setup or want a quick refresher.

danger.heading: Danger Zone
danger.description: Permanently delete all project data from your browser's local storage. Make sure you have exported your data first if you want to keep it.
danger.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete all your project data from local storage. This cannot be undone. Make sure you have exported your data first.

kdp.heading: KDP Formatting Preview
kdp.noChapters: Add chapters on the Manuscript page to enable export.

blurb.heading: Back-Cover Blurb
blurb.description: Generate market-ready jacket copy / book description — a hooky, spoiler-free pitch for the back cover and your retail product page.
blurb.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

marketing.heading: Marketing / Amazon Copy
marketing.description: A full KDP listing package: product description, editorial hook, search keywords, browse categories, and A+ bullet points.
marketing.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

logline.heading: Logline & Elevator Pitch
logline.description: One-sentence loglines, a 30-second elevator pitch, a punchy tagline, and an "X meets Y" comp line — for queries, conferences, and quick pitches.
logline.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

tracker.heading: Submission Tracker
tracker.empty: No submissions tracked yet. Click "Add Submission" to get started.

dashboard.noSynopsis: No synopsis added yet. Head to the Story Bible to define your core narrative.

block.fearHeadline: You showed up. That takes courage.
block.fearNudge: Write one paragraph nobody will ever see.
block.perfectionismHeadline: First drafts are supposed to be messy.
block.directionHeadline: You don't need to know the ending.
block.directionNudge: Write the next scene you can see.

health.issues: {count, plural, one {# story health issue} other {# story health issues}} detected
health.plotHoles: {count, plural, one {# plot hole} other {# plot holes}}

dashboard.emptyChaptersSubtitle: Every great manuscript begins with a single chapter.
dashboard.emptyLoopsSubtitle: Your narrative threads are all accounted for.

projects.title: Your Stories
projects.subtitle: Every project keeps its own manuscript, characters, history, and writing stats.
projects.emptySubtitle: Create your first story to begin.
projects.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete "{title}" and all its chapters, characters, history, and stats? This cannot be undone.

genesis.tagline: Build your story from the ground up.
genesis.importInstead: Already have a manuscript? Import it instead

name.label: Project Name
name.description: What will you call this story?

logline.label: Logline
logline.description: Describe your story in one or two sentences.

genre-tone.label: Genre & Tone
genre-tone.description: Pick the genres and tones that define your narrative.

world.label: World
world.description: Where and when does this story take place?

placeholders.name: e.g., The Obsidian Crown
placeholders.logline: e.g., A disgraced knight must reclaim a cursed artifact before it destroys the realm.
placeholders.worldTime: Time period (e.g., Medieval, 2150 AD, Victorian era)

profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Your local identity in Zagafy. Stored in this browser only — no account or sign-in required.

diagnostic.title: Before you begin...
diagnostic.subtitle: How are you feeling about writing today? This helps Zagafy adapt to where you are right now.
diagnostic.streak: Check-in streak: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

prep.fear: Write freely. No one is watching.
prep.perfectionism: Your inner editor is off duty.

blocks.perfectionismDesc: Nothing I write feels good enough
blocks.directionDesc: I don't know where to go next

ritual.title: Take a moment before you begin
ritual.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to transition into your writing.
ritual.inspirationDesc: A quote to spark your session

heteronyms.heading: Alter Egos
heteronyms.explainer: An alter ego is a writing voice — a persona with its own tone, vocabulary, and pacing. Pick one in Flow mode and the AI (micro-prompts, coach, chat) shapes its suggestions to match that voice. Use them to write distinct POVs or characters in their own style. Alter egos are saved per project.
heteronyms.empty: No alter egos yet. Create one to get started.
heteronyms.deleteMessage: This alter ego will be permanently removed. If it is currently active, writing will switch back to your default voice.

modal.bioPlaceholder: Who is this writer? Where do they come from?

editor.additionalPlaceholder: e.g. 'Uses metaphors from the sea, avoids contractions'
editor.styleNotePlaceholder: How do they write? e.g. 'Fragmented sentences, raw emotion'

switch.title: Switch Voice
switch.noOthers: No other voices available. Create alter egos in Settings.

characterChat.title: Character Chat
characterChat.empty: No characters yet. Add characters in the Characters page first.

editor.placeholder: Start writing... no backspace, no delete, just forward.
editor.sceneChangeCompleteToast: Scene change complete! You wrote {count, plural, one {# word} other {# words}} in the other chapter.
editor.originalDeletedToast: Original chapter was deleted. Staying in current chapter.
editor.switchingScenesSub: A change of scenery to spark new ideas
editor.returningToChapterSub: You wrote {count, plural, one {# word} other {# words}} during the detour
editor.activeSceneChangeMessage: You have an active scene change. Exiting will cancel it. Are you sure?

braindumpPanel.noWords: No words captured. Try recording again.

braindumpHistory.heading: Voice History
braindumpHistory.emptySubtitle: Your braindump sessions will appear here.

braindumpMessage.denied: Microphone access denied. <link>Allow mic access</link> and try again.

chapterSelect.title: Choose a chapter
chapterSelect.empty: No chapters yet. Create one in the Manuscript section first.

closingRitual.everyWordCountsBody: Keep writing. The best sentences come when you least expect them.
closingRitual.degradedNote: The oracle rests; an older voice answers.
closingRitual.q1: What surprised you about what you wrote today?
closingRitual.q2: Which character felt most alive in this session?
closingRitual.q3: What would your protagonist say about today's work?
closingRitual.q4: Did you discover something unexpected about your story?
closingRitual.q5: What scene are you most curious to write next?

noRetreatToggle.titleOn: No-Retreat Mode: ON — no deletions allowed
noRetreatToggle.titleOff: No-Retreat Mode: OFF — click to enable

sceneChangeRecovery.title: Scene Change Expired
sceneChangeRecovery.message: Your scene change timer ran out while you were away. Return to {title}?

sceneryPrompt.instruction: A short creative exercise can reignite your flow. Pick one:

reader.emptySubtitle: Write some chapters in the Manuscript page first.

writingMap.title: Writing Map
writingMap.subtitleStats: {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} — {words, number} words tracked
writingMap.subtitleEmpty: Your writing patterns will appear here as you write.
writingMap.wordsByHourAria: Words written by hour of day
writingMap.craftHeading: What I've noticed about your craft
writingMap.craftAria: What I've noticed about your craft

sprints.title: Writing Sprints
sprints.subtitle: Timed sessions to push your word count. Pick a theme and write.

quick-focus.name: Quick Focus
quick-focus.prompt: Write without stopping. Don't edit, don't look back — just move the story forward.

deep-dive.name: Deep Dive
deep-dive.prompt: Sink into a single scene. Describe the setting, the emotions, the sensory details.

marathon-push.name: Marathon Push
marathon-push.prompt: Push through an extended session. Cover ground — move from one scene to the next.

dialogue-sprint.name: Dialogue Sprint
dialogue-sprint.prompt: Focus on conversation. Let your characters talk — reveal tension through what they say and don't say.

conflict-burst.name: Conflict Burst
conflict-burst.prompt: Write a scene of pure conflict — argument, chase, confrontation. Keep the tension high.

storyBrain.title: Story Brain
storyBrain.subtitle: {entities, plural, one {# entity} other {# entities}} tracked — {issues, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}} need attention
storyBrain.noInconsistencies: No inconsistencies detected. Your story is clean!

toggle.label: Story Brain
toggle.ariaUnresolved: Story Brain — {count, plural, one {# unresolved} other {# unresolved}}

plotHolePanel.empty: No plot holes detected. Your narrative is solid!

canon.title: Canon Lock
canon.subtitle: Classify story information by certainty level. The AI Assistant will strictly respect Confirmed Canon and ignore Discarded items.

conflicts.title: Conflicts
conflicts.subtitle: Track active tensions, subplots, and resolutions.
conflicts.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
conflicts.descPlaceholder: Describe the tension, stakes, and involved parties...
conflicts.emptySubtitle: Every great story needs tension. What stands in your characters' way?

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Track key events and their impact on the story.
timeline.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{date}"? This cannot be undone.
timeline.emptySubtitle: Mark the moments that shaped your story.

versions.title: Versions
versions.subtitle: Frozen copies of your entire story. Restore one to roll back to a known-good state.
versions.capNote: Snapshots are stored on this device. Up to <cap>{count}</cap> are kept; the oldest are pruned automatically.
versions.descPlaceholder: Optional: what changed since the last save?
versions.emptySubtitle: Save your first snapshot above before risky edits.
versions.restoreMessage: Restoring "{name}" will replace your current state with the snapshot from {date}. {detail}
versions.restoreSameSize: The snapshot is identical in size to your current work.

characters.title: Characters
characters.subtitle: Manage your cast, their roles, and relationships.
characters.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
characters.emptySubtitle: Add your first character to begin building your world.
characters.coreIdentityPlaceholder: Baseline personality, permanent traits, deeply held values...
characters.currentKnowledgePlaceholder: What do they know right now?
characters.emotionalStatePlaceholder: How are they feeling in this exact moment?
characters.visibleGoalPlaceholder: What are they actively trying to achieve?
characters.hiddenNeedPlaceholder: What do they actually need (but might not know)?
characters.currentFearPlaceholder: What are they most afraid of right now?
characters.dominantBeliefPlaceholder: What belief is driving their current actions?
characters.emotionalWoundPlaceholder: What past hurt is influencing them?
characters.auditEmpty: Run an audit to check for OOC risks and get behavioral recommendations based on current state.

manuscript.title: Manuscript
manuscript.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
manuscript.summaryPlaceholder: Brief summary for the Story Bible...
manuscript.emptySubtitle: Every great story begins with a single chapter.

outline.title: Outline
outline.subtitle: A bird's-eye corkboard of every chapter.
outline.count: {filtered} of {total, plural, one {# chapter} other {# chapters}}
outline.emptySubtitle: Add chapters on the manuscript page; they'll show up here as cards.
outline.noMatch: No chapters match the current filters.
outline.noSummary: No summary yet — tap to add.
outline.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.

bible.title: Story Bible
bible.subtitle: The core foundation of your narrative universe.
bible.reviewDrafts: Review {count, plural, one {# draft} other {# drafts}}
bible.synopsisPlaceholder: Write a high-level summary of your plot...
bible.stylePlaceholder: Describe your writing style, tone, and pacing (e.g., 'Dark fantasy, fast-paced action, lyrical descriptions')...
bible.intentPlaceholder: What are you currently working toward? (e.g., 'Building tension for the betrayal reveal in Chapter 12', 'Developing the romantic subplot before the climax')...
bible.intentHint: This guides the AI assistant with your current creative direction. Update it as your focus changes.
bible.emptySubtitle: Extract from your manuscript or add a section manually.
bible.noChaptersError: No chapters with written content. Add chapter text on the Manuscript page before extracting.
bible.found: Found {count, plural, one {# section} other {# sections}}
bible.sectionDeleteMessage: Remove "{title}" from the world bible? This cannot be undone.
bible.promoteMessage: "{title}" will be enforced as canon by the AI assistant. Future suggestions, audits, and chat responses will treat it as authoritative truth.
bible.discardMessage: Mark "{title}" as discarded? It will no longer be considered canon. You can restore it later.
bible.foundSelect: {count, plural, one {# section} other {# sections}} found — select which to add
bible.nothingWaiting: Nothing waiting — every section has a settled status.
bible.queueDraftCount: {count, plural, one {# draft section} other {# draft sections}} across the world bible.
bible.emptyHint: Run extraction or add new sections to populate the queue.
bible.promoteAllMessage: {count, plural, one {# section} other {# sections}} will be enforced as canon by the AI assistant. Future suggestions, audits, and chat responses will treat them as authoritative truth.
bible.discardSelectedMessage: {count, plural, one {# draft section will be} other {# draft sections will be}} marked as discarded. You can restore them later.

importPage.title: Document Ingestion
importPage.subtitle: Upload your manuscript, notes, or outlines to auto-extract story intelligence.
importPage.supports: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown files.
importPage.analyzingDesc: Our AI is reading your text, extracting chapters, characters, conflicts, and worldbuilding details. This may take a minute for large files.
importPage.reviewDesc: Review each extracted entity below. Accept, edit, or reject items individually. Entities marked as duplicates already exist in your project. All accepted items will be imported as "Draft" status.
importPage.successWithCount: {count} entities have been reviewed, approved, and merged into your project memory. You can now continue writing with full context.
importPage.successNoCount: Your manuscript has been successfully parsed, structured, and merged into your project memory. You can now continue writing with full context.
importPage.toastImported: Successfully imported {count} entities into project memory.
importPage.stillPending: ({count} still pending — pending items will not be imported)

assistant.title: Narrative Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Chat with your story's memory.
assistant.welcome: Hello! I'm your narrative copilot. I have access to your Story Bible, characters, and manuscript. How can I help you today?
assistant.clearConfirmMessage: This will remove all messages. This cannot be undone.
assistant.placeholder: Ask about your story, request ideas, or say 'I'm stuck'...

gamification.streakAria: Writing streak: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
gamification.noQuests: No quests available today. Check back tomorrow!

insight.keepWritingDetail: Keep writing — we need at least 5 sessions to reveal your patterns.
insight.consistentAllHours: You're consistently productive at all hours. Impressive.
insight.secretHour: Your secret hour: You write {percent}% more between {range} than at any other time.
insight.typingSpeed: Your average typing speed is {wpm} WPM across {count} tracked sessions.
insight.flowPeak: Your flow moments peak at {range} with {count} detected.

timeline.title: Flow Timeline
timeline.ariaLabel: Flow timeline: {count, plural, one {# flow moment} other {# flow moments}}, score {score}

memory.empty: Run the story coach on a chapter to start building a memory of your craft.
memory.confirmMessage: Forget all {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}} the AI coach has built up about your craft? This cannot be undone.
memory.pinTitle: Pin to prioritize this insight in prompts

pacing.empty: Add chapters to see how their lengths compare.
pacing.label: Pacing: {status}
pacing.variedDesc: Some chapters run longer than others — usually fine.
pacing.erraticDesc: Chapter lengths swing widely. Worth a structural pass.

heatmap.ariaLabel: Writing activity heatmap for the past year
heatmap.flowMoments: {count, plural, one {# flow moment} other {# flow moments}}

readerView.unsupported: Speech synthesis is not supported in your browser.

storyCoach.title: Story Coach
storyCoach.empty: No insights yet. Click refresh to analyze your chapter.
storyCoach.highPriority: {count, plural, one {# high-priority insight} other {# high-priority insights}}
storyCoach.totalInsights: {count, plural, one {# coaching insight} other {# coaching insights}}
